description.ko: 빛의 형태가 깨지는 순간을 시각화합니다. 순수한 백색 에너지가 가시적인 유채색 스펙트럼으로 변하는 굴절의 정교한 움직임을 담아냈습니다.
description.en: Visualizing the moment light breaks its form. This piece captures the intricate dance of refraction as it transforms pure white energy into a visible spectrum of colors.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a triangular crystal prism on a dark surface. A single beam of intense white light hits the edge, refracting into a vivid, sharp rainbow spectrum across the frame. High detail, 8k resolution, caustic light effects, ethereal atmosphere, glass textures.
